title: CatalogItem
description: A single capability in the SaferSkills catalog (a skill, MCP server, hook, plugin, or rules artifact). One catalog_item = one capability; a capability may link to a GitHub repo, and several capabilities can share one repo (a repo scan discovers + scores each independently).

kind.description: Artifact taxonomy. `rules` covers Cursor / Windsurf-style rule files.

slug.description: URL-safe slug, double-dash-separated segments. A legacy repo-level slug is `<org>--<repo>`; a per-capability slug is `<org>--<repo>--<kind>-<name>[-<hash6>]`. Public uploads use `upload--<arthash8>--<kind>-<name>`; per-run unlisted shadow rows use `unlisted--<run8>--<kind>-<name>`. Used in `/items/<slug>` permalinks (unlisted shadow slugs 404 on the public surface).

displayName.description: Human-facing name as resolved from the source artifact.

githubUrl.description: Canonical GitHub URL on the default branch. Null for non-GitHub sources — uploaded artifacts (`sourceKind = 'upload'`) have no GitHub origin.

githubOrg.description: GitHub organisation or user that owns the repo. Null for uploaded artifacts (no GitHub origin).

githubRepo.description: GitHub repository name. Null for uploaded artifacts.

defaultBranch.description: Repo default branch resolved at first ingestion. Used as the `ref` for tarball fetches when no SHA is pinned. Null for uploaded artifacts.

visibility.description: Listing posture (denormalized from the owning scan_run). `public` rows appear in the catalog; `unlisted` shadow rows are excluded from every public query and reachable only via their capability URL. Never an access-control mechanism — see security.md.

sourceKind.description: Origin of the scanned bytes — `github` (fetched from a repo) or `upload` (a directly-uploaded artifact).

popularityTier.description: PRD §6.2 scan-tier assignment. `indexed`: metadata only. `lite`: shallow scan, weekly rescan. `deep`: full scan, hourly rescan. `on_demand`: user-submitted, hourly rescan.

popularityScore.description: Weekly-recomputed popularity rank within the artifact kind. Drives popularityTier assignment.

agentCompatibility.description: Closed-enum list of agent platforms this artifact is compatible with. Populated by a deterministic kind+manifest mapping at ingestion (see docs/methodology.md § Agent compatibility). Drives the catalog Agent-compatibility filter (array-overlap). Empty until ingestion populates.

githubStars.description: GitHub stargazer count, refreshed from api.github.com at scan time. Null until first fetch. Surfaced on the item-detail header (read-only mirror of public GitHub data).

githubForks.description: GitHub fork count, refreshed from api.github.com at scan time. Null until first fetch.

licenseSpdx.description: SPDX license id resolved from the GitHub repo license object (e.g. `Apache-2.0`, `MIT`). Null when unknown/unlicensed.

latestVersion.description: Latest GitHub release tag (e.g. `v1.3.1`), from /releases/latest. Null when the repo publishes no releases.

contentHashSha256.description: SHA-256 of the canonical tarball at the most recent scan. Null until first scan. Used by the hash-drift detector (SS-MCP-SUPPLY-CHAIN-HASH-DRIFT-01).

archived.description: True when the upstream repo is deleted or marked archived on GitHub. Archived items are excluded from re-scans but their last verdict stays public.

registryUrl.description: Permalink to the listing on the source registry.

firstIndexedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of first indexing from this source.

lastSeenAt.description: Most recent ingestion sweep that observed this listing.

sources.description: Source registries that contributed this item. Non-empty — an item without any source isn't catalogable.

metadata.description: Extensible bag for per-kind fields surfaced by ingestion adapters. Treat as opaque at the API boundary.
